LanguageData.VFEFactory_FactoryNotWorking: This factory is not working at the moment.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_OverclockDesc: Overclock this factory to make it produce faster at the expense of more energy. Current overclocking at: {0}
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MasonryBlocks: 20 blocks of the same stone as the chunk used
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Butchery: Meat of the corpse in the form of processed mince
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ButcheryHuman: Meat of the corpse in the form of human meat
